source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Two springs with the same spring constant are installed in a massless piston/cylinder arrangement with the outside air at 100 kPa. If the piston is at the bottom, both springs are relaxed, and the second spring comes in contact with the piston at V=2 m^3. The cylinder contains ammonia initially at−2\circ\text{C}, x = 0.13, V= 1 m^3, which is then heated until the pressure reaches 1200 kPa. Finally the piston touch the second spring. Find the heat transfer.

The cylinder contains ammonia initially at−2\circ\text{C}, x = 0.13, V= 1 m^3, which is then heated until the pressure reaches 1200 kPa. Finally the piston touch the second spring. Find the heat transfer.
